definition.en: A gift for explaining God’s truth clearly so others can understand it and grow.
definition.zh: 清楚讲解神真理的恩赐，使人能够明白并且成长。

definition.en: A gift for meeting practical needs and supporting the work behind the scenes.
definition.zh: 满足实际需要、在幕后支持事工的恩赐。

definition.en: A gift for coming alongside the hurting with compassion and comfort.
definition.zh: 以怜悯和安慰陪伴受伤之人的恩赐。

definition.en: A gift for generously providing resources to advance God’s kingdom.
definition.zh: 慷慨供应资源、推进神国度的恩赐。

definition.en: A gift for casting vision and guiding people toward a shared goal.
definition.zh: 描绘异象、带领众人朝共同目标前进的恩赐。

definition.en: A gift for welcoming others warmly and helping them feel they belong.
definition.zh: 热情接待他人、使人感到有归属的恩赐。

definition.en: A gift for sharing the good news of Jesus naturally and with courage.
definition.zh: 自然而勇敢地传扬耶稣好消息的恩赐。

definition.en: A gift for strengthening and comforting others with timely, hope-filled words.
definition.zh: 以合时、满有盼望的话语坚固并安慰他人的恩赐。

definition.en: A gift for organizing people and details so ministry runs smoothly.
definition.zh: 组织人手与细节、使事工顺畅运作的恩赐。

text.en: I enjoy explaining Scripture in a way people can grasp.
text.zh: 我喜欢用人容易明白的方式讲解圣经。

text.en: I would rather quietly get a task done than stand up front.
text.zh: 比起站在台前，我更愿意默默把事情做好。

text.en: My heart is drawn to people who are hurting or overlooked.
text.zh: 我的心特别被那些受伤或被忽略的人吸引。

text.en: I look for chances to support God’s work with my resources.
text.zh: 我会寻找机会，用我的资源支持神的工作。

text.en: I can cast a vision and rally people toward a goal.
text.zh: 我能描绘异象，并召聚众人朝一个目标前进。

text.en: I love making newcomers feel welcomed and at home.
text.zh: 我喜欢让初来的人感到被欢迎、宾至如归。

text.en: I look for natural ways to share the good news of Jesus.
text.zh: 我会寻找自然的机会，与人分享耶稣的好消息。

text.en: I know how to speak words that lift someone up.
text.zh: 我懂得用话语来激励、扶持一个人。

text.en: I enjoy organizing details so an event runs smoothly.
text.zh: 我喜欢把细节安排妥当，好让活动顺利进行。

text.en: I love studying a passage deeply until its meaning becomes clear.
text.zh: 我喜欢深入研读一段经文，直到明白它的意思。

text.en: I notice practical needs around me and step in to meet them.
text.zh: 我会留意身边实际的需要，并主动去满足它们。

text.en: I can sit with a grieving friend without needing to fix anything.
text.zh: 我能安静地陪伴悲伤的朋友，而不急着替他解决问题。

text.en: I feel joy giving generously, often without telling anyone.
text.zh: 我乐意慷慨地给予，而且常常不让别人知道。

text.en: People tend to follow the direction I set.
text.zh: 别人往往会跟随我所定的方向。

text.en: Opening my home to others brings me real joy.
text.zh: 向别人敞开我的家，让我真心喜乐。

text.en: Talking about my faith with people who don’t yet believe excites me.
text.zh: 与还未信主的人谈论我的信仰，让我兴奋。

text.en: People often feel more hopeful after talking with me.
text.zh: 别人和我谈过之后，常常感到更有盼望。

text.en: I can turn a messy plan into a clear, workable schedule.
text.zh: 我能把杂乱的计划整理成清晰可行的时间表。

text.en: People come to me when they want to understand a hard teaching.
text.zh: 当别人想弄懂一个难明白的教导时，会来找我。

text.en: Setting up, cleaning up, and behind-the-scenes work suit me well.
text.zh: 布置场地、收拾整理这些幕后的工作很适合我。

text.en: I often sense when someone is quietly struggling.
text.zh: 当有人正在默默挣扎时，我常常能够察觉。

text.en: When I hear of a real need, I quickly think about how I can provide.
text.zh: 当我听到一个真实的需要时，我很快就会想我能如何供应。

text.en: I enjoy taking responsibility for a team and its outcome.
text.zh: 我乐意为一个团队和它的成果承担责任。

text.en: I can naturally start a warm conversation with a stranger.
text.zh: 我能自然地与陌生人开始一段温暖的谈话。

text.en: I often pray for friends who don’t yet know Christ.
text.zh: 我常为那些还不认识基督的朋友祷告。

text.en: I love coming alongside someone to help them keep going.
text.zh: 我喜欢陪伴一个人，帮助他坚持走下去。

text.en: Coordinating people and tasks comes easily to me.
text.zh: 协调人手与安排任务对我来说很容易。

text.en: I find joy in helping someone see a truth they had missed.
text.zh: 帮助别人看见他们以前忽略的真理，让我很喜乐。

text.en: I feel useful when I can lighten someone else’s workload.
text.zh: 当我能为别人分担一些重担时，我觉得自己有用。

text.en: Comforting people in pain feels natural to me.
text.zh: 安慰在痛苦中的人，对我来说是很自然的事。

text.en: I can see the big picture and help others move toward it.
text.zh: 我能看见整体的大局，并帮助别人一同朝着它前进。

text.en: I pay attention so that no one is left standing alone.
text.zh: 我会留意，好让没有人被冷落、独自站在一旁。

text.en: I carry a burden to see people far from God come home.
text.zh: 我心里有负担，渴望看见远离神的人回到祂面前。

text.en: When someone is discouraged, I want to remind them of God’s promises.
text.zh: 当有人灰心时，我会想提醒他神的应许。

text.en: I keep track of the steps needed to reach a goal.
text.zh: 我会理清达成目标所需要的每一个步骤。

text.en: I would gladly prepare a lesson to teach a small group.
text.zh: 我很乐意预备一堂课，去教导一个小组。

text.en: Making decisions under pressure energizes rather than drains me.
text.zh: 在压力下做决定让我更有干劲，而不是让我疲惫。

text.en: I love explaining God’s Word in a way that also strengthens people’s faith.
text.zh: 我喜欢讲解神的话，同时也坚固人的信心。

text.en: When someone is in need, I want to meet both their practical and emotional needs.
text.zh: 当有人有需要时，我想同时满足他实际和情感上的需要。

text.en: I gladly prepare food and space so guests feel cared for.
text.zh: 我乐意预备饭食和场地，让客人感到被关怀。
